violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Handwashing sink in the dishwashing area was found with an empty paper towel dispenser. Paper towels should be available at all times.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Observed food employee washing dishes and he did not follow the 3 step method. The rinse step was skipped in the process. Items should be washed, rinsed and sanitized.
